transcription.text: Mrs. Fitzhorton! It's on the way! Move! Bring everything! Let's go! Fortunately, the Sandwich King had a new AMC Pacer. The Pacer is wider than any other small car, so he had room to work on his giant creations. And since it's wider, it gives an incredibly stable ride. At a time he couldn't afford to make any mistakes. The AMC Pacer. No other small car can make this sandwich.

segments.text: Mrs. Fitzhorton! It's on the way! Move! Bring everything! Let's go!
Fortunately, the Sandwich King had a new AMC Pacer.
The Pacer is wider than any other small car, so he had room to work on his giant creations.
And since it's wider, it gives an incredibly stable ride.
At a time he couldn't afford to make any mistakes.
The AMC Pacer. No other small car can make this sandwich.
